function.name: simulate_basalt_cooling_rate
function.description: Simulate cooling rate of basaltic magma in a volcanic dike given thickness and ambient temperature.

prompt: Run a cooling simulation for a 4-meter basalt dike intruding rock at 25 C with magma at 1180 C.

function.name: chart_sonar_bathymetry_pass
function.description: Chart a single bathymetric pass from a marine sonar over a survey line.

prompt: Chart the bathymetry pass on line NS-17 using the 200 kHz transducer.

function.name: monitor_kraft_pulp_kappa
function.description: Monitor kappa number of kraft pulp during the cooking stage of a pulp digester.

prompt: Start kappa monitoring on digester D-3 sampled every 15 minutes.

function.name: log_foundry_pour_temperature
function.description: Log molten metal pour temperature at the ladle outlet for a foundry casting run.

prompt: Log a ductile iron pour from ladle L-12 at 1432 C.

function.name: estimate_glacier_mass_balance
function.description: Estimate annual mass balance of a glacier from accumulation and ablation data.

prompt: Estimate the 2025 mass balance for Briksdalsbreen.

function.name: schedule_turbine_blade_inspection
function.description: Schedule a borescope inspection for wind turbine blades.

prompt: Book a blade borescope inspection for turbine WT-44 on 2026-06-12.

function.name: probe_bridge_strain_gauge
function.description: Read out a single strain gauge bonded to a bridge structural member.

prompt: Pull a strain reading from gauge SG-09 on bridge BR-East-3.

function.name: tap_smelter_slag_chemistry
function.description: Sample slag chemistry from a smelting furnace tap.

prompt: Take a slag chemistry sample from furnace F-2 on tap 18.

function.name: trigger_refinery_coker_drum_switch
function.description: Trigger a coke drum switch operation in a delayed coker at an oil refinery.

prompt: Switch coker unit COK-1 over to drum B.

function.name: sample_drillhole_assay
function.description: Submit a drillhole core interval for assay at a mining laboratory.

prompt: Send interval 142.5 to 145.0 m from drillhole DDH-2025-08 to assay.

function.name: register_hydraulic_pump_curve
function.description: Register a measured pump performance curve for a hydraulic engineering installation.

prompt: Register a pump curve for the KSB Etanorm 80-200 unit at station PS-North.

function.name: queue_paper_machine_grade_change
function.description: Queue a grade change on a paper machine to a new basis weight.

prompt: Queue PM-4 to switch over to 90 gsm.

function.name: load_seismic_refraction_profile
function.description: Load a seismic refraction profile from a near-surface geophysical survey.

prompt: Pull up refraction profile SRP-2024-East.

function.name: annotate_core_box_photo
function.description: Attach geological annotations to a core box photograph.

prompt: Annotate core box CB-117 with 'pervasive sericite alteration in andesite'.

function.name: drain_blast_furnace_hearth
function.description: Initiate a controlled hearth drain on a blast furnace.

prompt: Drain blast furnace BF-5 for 90 minutes.

function.name: log_rov_dive_observation
function.description: Log an observation made by a remotely operated underwater vehicle during a dive.

prompt: Note from ROV Hercules at 2140 m: 'manganese nodule field, mean diameter 5 cm'.

gold_args.observation: manganese nodule field, mean diameter 5 cm

function.name: pin_permafrost_borehole_temp
function.description: Pin a permafrost borehole temperature reading at a given depth.

prompt: Pin borehole PERM-09 at 15 m depth showing -2.7 C.

function.name: issue_pipeline_pig_run
function.description: Issue an intelligent pig run order along a pipeline segment.

pig_type.description: Type of pig: MFL, UT, geometry

prompt: Schedule an MFL pig through segment PL-NorthA.

function.name: request_concrete_slump_test
function.description: Request a slump test for a delivered concrete batch on site.

prompt: Order a slump test for truck RM-204 hauling mix C40-A.

function.name: open_tailings_dam_piezometer
function.description: Open a piezometer reading on a tailings storage facility dam.

prompt: Open piezometer VW-12 on tailings dam TSF-South.

function.name: stage_pelletizing_disc_feed
function.description: Stage feed rate for an iron ore pelletizing disc.

feed_tph.description: Feed rate in tonnes per hour

prompt: Set pelletizer disc PD-7 feed to 240 tph.

function.name: punch_cathode_stripping_cell
function.description: Punch a stripping operation on an electrowinning cathode cell.

prompt: Strip copper cathodes in tankhouse TH-A cell 42.

function.name: checkin_offshore_jacket_inspection
function.description: Check in a diver inspection record for an offshore platform jacket member.

prompt: Check in the diver inspection on platform Brent-C member J-204.

function.name: spool_well_logging_tool
function.description: Spool a wireline well logging tool into a borehole.

prompt: Spool the triple-combo tool string into well NORTH-12H.

function.name: throttle_wind_farm_curtailment
function.description: Throttle wind farm output for grid curtailment.

prompt: Cap wind farm WF-Halland at 80 MW.

function.name: stamp_weld_NDT_result
function.description: Stamp a non-destructive test result on a structural weld.

method.description: NDT method: RT, UT, MT, PT

prompt: Stamp UT pass on weld W-2207.

function.name: broadcast_avalanche_bulletin
function.description: Broadcast an avalanche hazard bulletin for an alpine region.

prompt: Issue an avalanche bulletin for Tatra West at danger level 3.

function.name: burn_kiln_clinker_phase
function.description: Set a phase target for clinker formation in a cement rotary kiln.

phase.description: Target clinker phase: C3S, C2S, C3A, C4AF

prompt: Bias kiln K-2 toward C3S phase.

function.name: ping_geothermal_reservoir_tracer
function.description: Inject a chemical tracer into a geothermal reservoir injection well.

prompt: Push naphthalene sulfonate down injector INJ-3.

function.name: store_lidar_pointcloud_tile
function.description: Store a lidar point cloud tile from an airborne geosciences survey.

prompt: Archive lidar tile T-N4523E0712 in EPSG 25832.

function.name: calibrate_lng_tank_radar_gauge
function.description: Calibrate a tank radar level gauge on an LNG storage tank against a manual sounding.

manual_level_m.description: Reference level from manual sounding in meters

prompt: Calibrate tank LNG-T2 radar reading 28.41 m against hand sounding 28.36 m, operator Janssen.

function.name: tune_flotation_cell_reagent
function.description: Tune frother and collector dosing on a mineral flotation cell.

frother_gpt.description: Frother dosage in grams per tonne

collector_gpt.description: Collector dosage in grams per tonne

prompt: Set flotation cell FC-Rougher-4 to 28 g/t MIBC and 45 g/t SIBX.

function.name: simulate_dam_overtopping_event
function.description: Run a hydraulic overtopping simulation for an earthfill dam under a flood scenario.

inflow_cms.description: Peak inflow in cubic meters per second

duration_hr.description: Duration of flood event in hours

prompt: Simulate overtopping on dam D-Volta for a 1850 m3/s peak inflow lasting 6.5 hours.

function.name: phase_align_turbine_yaw_motor
function.description: Phase-align the yaw drive motor encoder on a wind turbine nacelle.

prompt: Align yaw motor 3 on turbine WT-77 with a -1.4 deg offset.

function.name: characterize_aquifer_pump_test
function.description: Characterize aquifer transmissivity from a constant-rate pumping test.

prompt: Analyze a 24-hour pump test on well PW-3 at 18.5 L/s.

function.name: draft_ore_pass_blast_pattern
function.description: Draft a blast pattern for an underground mining ore pass development round.

prompt: Draft a blast pattern on level 850 round R-22 with 0.9 m burden and 1.1 m spacing.

function.name: trace_bridge_modal_frequency
function.description: Trace the dominant modal frequency from accelerometer data on a cable-stayed bridge.

prompt: Identify the main mode on bridge BR-Sava-2 channel ACC-Pylon-N over a 120 second window.

function.name: tune_distillation_column_reflux
function.description: Tune reflux ratio on a refinery distillation column.

feed_bpd.description: Feed rate in barrels per day

prompt: Adjust reflux on crude column CDU-1 to 2.8 with 75000 bpd feed.

function.name: weave_galvanizing_zinc_thickness
function.description: Set zinc coating thickness target for a hot-dip galvanizing line.

strip_speed_mpm.description: Strip speed in meters per minute

prompt: Target 85 um zinc on line GL-2 at 120 m/min.

function.name: track_iceberg_drift_vector
function.description: Track drift speed and bearing for an Antarctic iceberg.

prompt: Log iceberg A-76C drifting at 0.32 knots on bearing 287 degrees.

function.name: quench_steel_billet_zone
function.description: Set water quench rate per zone for a continuous caster steel billet.

prompt: Bump zone 4 water on caster CC-3 to 1320 L/min.

function.name: season_sandcasting_mould
function.description: Schedule a baking and seasoning cycle for a green sand casting mould.

prompt: Season mould M-227 at 220 C for 6 hours.

function.name: patch_pipeline_corrosion_indication
function.description: Record a planned patch repair for an external corrosion indication on a buried pipeline.

depth_pct_wt.description: Depth as percent of wall thickness

prompt: Log a sleeve repair on segment PL-South-B at chainage 14.27 km, 38% wt loss.

function.name: fingerprint_oil_spill_sample
function.description: Submit an oil spill sample for chemical fingerprinting against a source library.

prompt: Run GC-MS fingerprinting on spill sample SPL-2026-11 against the Nordic Crude library.

function.name: elevate_blast_furnace_oxygen_enrichment
function.description: Adjust oxygen enrichment level on the hot blast feed to a blast furnace.

prompt: Push oxygen enrichment on BF-4 up to 6.2 percent.

function.name: trap_geophone_first_break
function.description: Pick the first-break time on a geophone trace from a refraction survey.

prompt: On shot S-117 channel 24, pick first break at 38.4 ms.

function.name: estimate_underground_stope_dilution
function.description: Estimate planned dilution for an underground mining stope.

prompt: Estimate dilution on stope ST-09 with ore width 3.5 m and 0.45 m overbreak.

function.name: log_paper_machine_break
function.description: Log a sheet break event on a paper machine with cause code.

prompt: Record a break on PM-6 in the wet press, cause WP-EDGE-CRACK.

function.name: trim_ship_ballast_tank
function.description: Trim a ballast tank load on a bulk carrier to correct trim and heel.

prompt: Set tank WBT-3S on MV Northern Hawk to 65 percent.

function.name: tag_drillcore_lithology
function.description: Tag a lithology interval in a logged diamond drillcore.

prompt: Tag DDH-2026-04 from 87.20 to 95.60 m as QFP (quartz feldspar porphyry).

function.name: purge_oil_rig_mud_system
function.description: Purge and replace drilling mud across an oil rig mud pit system.

prompt: Swap mud on rig RIG-North-7 from WBM to OBM.

function.name: vector_uav_powerline_inspection
function.description: Plan a UAV inspection flight along a high-voltage transmission line.

prompt: Plan a drone inspection on line L-400kV-A from tower T-118 to tower T-145.

function.name: stage_coke_oven_pushing_schedule
function.description: Stage the pushing schedule for coke ovens in a coke battery.

oven_count.description: Number of ovens in the run

prompt: Schedule 22 pushes on battery CB-1 every 9 minutes.

function.name: post_volcano_ash_advisory
function.description: Post a volcanic ash advisory for aviation routes downwind of an erupting volcano.

vaa_color.description: VAA color code: green, yellow, orange, red

prompt: Issue an orange advisory for Sakurajima with plume to 18000 ft.

function.name: burnish_rolling_mill_pass
function.description: Set roll gap and tension on a rolling mill pass for steel strip.

prompt: Configure mill HSM-1 pass 5 at 2.45 mm gap and 320 kN tension.

function.name: audit_cathodic_protection_potential
function.description: Audit ON and OFF potentials of a cathodic protection rectifier on a buried tank.

prompt: Audit rectifier R-12: ON -1320 mV, OFF -905 mV.

function.name: track_rail_track_geometry_car
function.description: Track defects detected by a rail track geometry inspection car.

prompt: Pull geometry car defects on line BNSF-3 between mileposts 412.5 and 438.0.

function.name: register_hydropower_governor_droop
function.description: Register governor droop setting on a hydropower turbine for grid frequency response.

prompt: Register a 5.2 percent droop on hydro unit U-4 at Kemano.

function.name: etch_pcb_metallization_step
function.description: Run an etching step on a PCB fabrication line with bath chemistry parameters.

prompt: Run panel P-90342 through cupric chloride etch for 72 seconds.

function.name: issue_subsea_BOP_function_test
function.description: Issue a function test directive for a subsea blowout preventer stack.

prompt: Function-test the blind shear ram on subsea BOP for well DW-Atlanta-2 at 5000 psi.

function.name: interpolate_orebody_grade_block
function.description: Interpolate a single block grade in an orebody model using ordinary kriging with anisotropic search.

search_x_m.description: Search radius along X axis in meters

search_y_m.description: Search radius along Y axis in meters

search_z_m.description: Search radius along Z axis in meters

prompt: Interpolate block BLK-117823 using an anisotropic search of 120 m east, 80 m north and 25 m vertical.

function.name: reconstruct_glacier_basal_sliding
function.description: Reconstruct basal sliding velocity from surface GPS displacement and ice thickness on a temperate glacier.

prompt: Reconstruct basal sliding for Hardangerjokulen given 22 m/yr surface velocity, 280 m thick ice, slope of 3.4 degrees.

function.name: synthesize_basin_thermal_history
function.description: Synthesize a 1D thermal subsidence history for a sedimentary basin column.

prompt: Build a thermal history for column C-N4 in the Vøring basin with rifting at 56 Ma and beta of 1.8.

function.name: harmonize_smelter_offgas_balance
function.description: Harmonize an off-gas mass balance across a copper flash smelter with sulfur and oxygen targets.

prompt: Balance offgas on smelter S-FF1 with 145 tph concentrate, 215 Nm3/t oxygen factor, matte grade 67 percent.

function.name: fit_bridge_fatigue_SN_curve
function.description: Fit a Wohler S-N fatigue curve to strain-cycle data from instrumented bridge welds.

prompt: Fit an S-N curve for bridge BR-Tay-2, detail class 71, 18 stress bins, endurance at 5e6 cycles.

function.name: deconvolve_marine_seismic_streamer
function.description: Deconvolve receiver ghosts from a towed marine seismic streamer record.

prompt: Deconvolve ghosts on line MS-2025-12 with streamer at 9 m and ghost notch at 83 Hz.

function.name: rebalance_tailings_paste_rheology
function.description: Rebalance binder dosage and solids percent for a paste tailings backfill mix to hit target yield stress.

prompt: Rebalance paste for stope ST-44 targeting 220 Pa yield stress at 78 percent solids, 4.5 percent binder.

function.name: optimize_kraft_recovery_boiler_load
function.description: Optimize black liquor firing rate and air staging on a kraft recovery boiler to balance steam and reduction efficiency.

prompt: Optimize recovery boiler RB-2 at 73 percent liquor solids, 35 percent primary air share, targeting 94 percent reduction.

function.name: project_pile_driving_refusal_depth
function.description: Project the depth at which driven piles will reach refusal based on SPT N-values and pile geometry.

prompt: Project refusal depth at site QH-12 for 600 mm piles with 90 kJ hammer for 3500 kN capacity.

function.name: calibrate_FCC_riser_kinetics
function.description: Calibrate lumped reaction kinetics in a fluid catalytic cracker riser against plant yields.

prompt: Calibrate kinetics for FCC unit FCC-2 with 22.4 API feed, riser outlet 535 C, C/O ratio 7.1.

function.name: invert_magnetotelluric_resistivity
function.description: Run a 1D Occam inversion of magnetotelluric apparent resistivity and phase curves at a sounding site.

prompt: Invert MT site MT-Eyja-09 from 0.01 s to 1000 s with regularization 3.0.

function.name: model_offshore_wind_wake_loss
function.description: Model annual array wake losses for an offshore wind farm using directional wind rose data.

mean_ws_ms.description: Mean wind speed in m/s at hub height

prompt: Model array losses for WF-DoggerBank-C, 87 turbines, 7D spacing, hub 10.4 m/s.

function.name: forecast_open_pit_slope_displacement
function.description: Forecast open pit wall displacement trajectory from radar monitoring history using an inverse velocity method.

prompt: Forecast slope failure on pit Bingham wall NW-12 with current 42 mm/day velocity over 28 days of history.

function.name: co_optimize_dam_hydropower_dispatch
function.description: Co-optimize reservoir release and hydropower generation against day-ahead market prices for a multi-purpose dam.

min_release_cms.description: Minimum release for downstream ecology in cms

prompt: Co-optimize dispatch for the Hartwell reservoir across 24 h with min release 35 cms, max 480 cms.

function.name: deduce_borehole_breakout_stress
function.description: Deduce in-situ horizontal stress orientation and magnitude from borehole breakout image logs.

depth_top_m.description: Top of analyzed interval in meters MD

depth_bot_m.description: Bottom of analyzed interval in meters MD

prompt: Deduce horizontal stress from FMI breakouts in well DEEP-9 between 3120 and 3540 m MD.

function.name: shim_rotor_balance_planes
function.description: Apply balancing shim weights to compressor rotor planes after a vibration trim.

prompt: Add a 12.5 g shim on plane 2 of compressor C-401 at 145 degrees.

function.name: render_culvert_scour_profile
function.description: Render the predicted scour profile downstream of a highway culvert outlet under a design storm.

d50_mm.description: Median bed grain size in mm

prompt: Render the scour profile for culvert CV-37 at 4.8 cms with d50 of 22 mm.

function.name: trigger_argon_oxygen_decarb
function.description: Trigger an AOD blow stage in stainless steel refining with oxygen and argon flow set points.

prompt: Trigger AOD converter AOD-1 stage 2 with 60 Nm3/min O2 and 30 Nm3/min Ar.

function.name: pace_continuous_caster_speed
function.description: Pace casting speed on a continuous slab caster to match downstream rolling mill demand.

prompt: Pace slab caster SC-2 to 1.35 m/min on a 1450 mm wide slab.

function.name: tally_underground_ventilation_circuit
function.description: Tally airflow across an underground mine ventilation circuit branch and check Kirchhoff balance.

prompt: Tally airflow on Kiruna mine branch B-Decline-Lv1245 at 78.5 m3/s.
